title: stylisma pickeringii
intro: Stylisma pickeringii, also known as the "Pickering's Stylisma" or "Smallflower Stylisma," is a perennial herb belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Stylisma pickeringii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of fever, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Stylisma pickeringii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
